Explains background grid implementation, center card rectangular layout, dark nodes with custom color-coded corner badges, and symmetric animated beams."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough: Integrations Section - Premium Dark Theme

Successfully rebuilt the integrations block in [features-section-14.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/components/shadcn-studio/blocks/features-section-14/features-section-14.tsx) in a high-end dark-themed style.

## Changes Made

### 1. Implemented Deep Dark Styling
- Changed the section background to a deep black (`bg-[#0A0A0A] dark:bg-neutral-950`).
- Added a subtle white line grid overlay: `bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,rgba(255,255,255,0.03)_1px,transparent_1px)...]`.
- Applied a radial gradient mask to create a soft, vignette fade towards the borders.

### 2. Formatted Center Card & Side Nodes
- **Center Node**: Swapped the circular shape for a rectangular card (`w-56 h-20 bg-[#141414] border border-neutral-800 rounded-lg`) containing the text `AI Greentick Hub` and the green `LogoVector` logo, styled with a glowing emerald box-shadow.
- **Side Nodes**: Transformed the 12 nodes into dark panels (`bg-[#141414] border border-neutral-800`) with high-contrast uppercase white text.
- **Corner Badges**: Positioned an absolute colored corner square on each card to mimic the corner badges from the reference image, using its official brand color (e.g. green for Shopify, orange for HubSpot, etc.).

### 3. Integrated Symmetric Animated Beams
- Configured 12 path beams that connect symmetrically from the side nodes to the center card without crossing.
- Set the path colors to a faint grey (`rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`) and the laser gradient pulse to emerald green (`#00b259`).

### 4. Adjusted Theme Typography & CTA Button
- Styled badge, H2, and subtext to high-contrast white and muted grey.
- Rendered a dark outline CTA button at the bottom: `View all integrations →` with hover transition states.

## Verification & Validation

### Build Compilation
- Verified production compiler using `npm run build` which succeeded without errors:
  ```bash
  ▲ Next.js 16.1.7 (Turbopack)
  ✓ Compiled successfully in 3.8s
  Running TypeScript ..
